storeOs.cloudCompatibility: PARTIAL — field mapping runs in both modes. In cloud mode: (1) shopify_import is read from the n8n trigger input payload instead of disk, (2) AJV schema validation is skipped, (3) artifact write and checkpoint update are skipped. store_profile is returned inline.
storeOs.invocation: Called as a subworkflow by orchestrate-phase1. Expects Subworkflow Trigger input: { project_id, normalized_intake_payload, runtime_config [, shopify_import (cloud mode only)] }
storeOs.output: { project_id, artifact_path, artifact_name, store_profile, runtime_config, status, notes [, cloud_mode, cloud_warnings], envelope }
notes: brand_maturity defaults to 'new' — no reliable signal available at intake time.
catalog_type is derived from active_product_count heuristic — user should verify.
operating_mode is mapped from publish_mode: no-publish/draft-only → draft-first, draft-and-review → staging-first.
AJV dependency: self-hosted only. Requires ajv@8 available in n8n's node_modules. Try ajv/dist/2020 first, falls back to ajv.
Phase 16: Added runtime envelope, assortment_shape, target_audience_hypotheses, value_proposition_hint, brand_voice_hint, ux_merchandising_maturity, open_questions enrichments.
